bug.description: missing mandatory information element in outgoing signaling message

prompt:
There is a missing mandatory information element in outgoing signaling message downstream of function pdcp_serialize_control_plane_data_pdu_with_SRB_sn_buffer in the openair2/LAYER2/PDCP_v10.1.0 subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/PDCP_v10.1.0/pdcp_primitives.c:107.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
